prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022–2025年理科组最低位次约904→728→1250→824名，波动剧烈：2023年曾升至728名，2024年骤降至1250名，2025年回升至824名；近三年累计后移约80名，2025 年基准约824名；该校在四川省理科组招生计划2022年66人、2023年66人、2024年51人、2025年48人，近年持续缩招后2026年大幅扩招至64人，较2025年 增加16人（+33.3%），扩招幅度为近年最大，显著缓解竞争压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 南京大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，C9联盟成员；软科中国大学排名2026年第6 名，学校层次稳居全国顶尖，对理科高分考生吸引力极强；2026年声誉评价偏负面但影响有限；抖音热度为高热（总排名第17位），短视频曝光量大；计算机、 人工智能等王牌专业在社交媒体上讨论热度高，报考关注度持续升温；拥有26个A-及以上学科，理科组相关A+学科包括计算机科学与技术、物理学、化学、天文 学、大气科学、环境科学与工程等，与招生专业（人工智能、计算机、电子信息等）高度匹配，学科实力全国顶尖。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机、人工智能、电子信息等专业 社会热度持续高热，就业前景好，报考竞争激烈；四川省2026年高考总人数约53.5万人，按物理类占比约61.5%估算，物理类考生约32.9万人，较2025年（约28.5万）增加约15.6% ，竞争基数扩大；南京大学位于江苏省南京市，非四川省本地高校；该校在四川理科组招生计划2026年大幅扩招，体现对四川优 质生源的重视。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次824名、2026年大幅扩招（+33.3%）的缓解效应与四川物理类考生增加（+15.6%）的竞争加剧效应；考虑计算机/AI等王牌专业持续高热、抖音关注度高，小幅上调至1014名。预计2026年最低位次约1014名，区间892–1136名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the science group was approximately 904 → 728 → 1250 → 824, with significant fluctuations: it rose to 728 in 2023, dropped sharply to 1250 in 2024, and rebounded to 824 in 2025; over the past three years, it has shifted backward by about 80 places, with a baseline of approximately 824 in 2025; the enrollment plan for this university in the Sichuan science group was 66 in 2022, 66 in 2023, 51 in 2024, and 48 in 2025, with a continuous reduction in recent years followed by a substantial expansion to 64 in 2026, an increase of 16 students (+33.3%) compared to 2025, the largest expansion in recent years, significantly alleviating competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanjing University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, a member of the C9 League; it ranks 6th in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, firmly among the top universities nationwide, with strong appeal to high-scoring science students; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative but has limited impact; Douyin popularity is high (ranked 17th overall), with significant short video exposure; flagship majors such as Computer Science and Artificial Intelligence have high discussion heat on social media, with increasing application attention; it has 26 A- or above disciplines, with A+ disciplines in the science group including Computer Science and Technology, Physics, Chemistry, Astronomy, Atmospheric Science, Environmental Science and Engineering, etc., highly matching the enrollment majors (Artificial Intelligence, Computer Science, Electronic Information, etc.), with top-tier academic strength nationwide.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, and Electronic Information continue to have high social heat, good employment prospects, and intense application competition; the total number of Sichuan Gaokao examinees in 2026 is approximately 535,000, with an estimated physics category proportion of about 61.5%, resulting in about 329,000 physics category examinees, an increase of about 15.6% compared to 2025 (approximately 285,000), expanding the competition base; Nanjing University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, not a local university in Sichuan; the 2026 enrollment plan for the Sichuan science group shows a significant expansion, reflecting the university's emphasis on high-quality Sichuan students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 824, the mitigating effect of the 2026 significant expansion (+33.3%), and the intensifying competition effect of the increase in Sichuan physics category examinees (+15.6%); considering the sustained high heat of flagship majors like Computer Science/AI and high Douyin attention, a slight upward adjustment to 1014. The estimated 2026 minimum ranking is approximately 1014, with a range of 892–1136.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the liberal arts group was approximately 187 → 208 → 175 → 240, showing significant fluctuations over the past four years. It rebounded to 175 in 2024 but fell back to 240 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 65 positions over the last two years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 240. The enrollment plan for the liberal arts group in Sichuan Province was 16 in 2022, 24 in 2023, 25 in 2024, and 26 in 2025, showing a trend of annual expansion. The 2026 plan is 33, an increase of 7 (+26.9%) compared to 2025, indicating a significant expansion, which alleviates competition pressure but is accompanied by a simultaneous increase in the candidate base.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanjing University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university, and a member of the C9 League. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it ranks 6th, with a stable position at 6th in recent years. The university's level is extremely high, maintaining strong appeal to high-scoring candidates. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, involving incidents related to cafeteria management and dormitory policies, but the number of incidents is small (5), with limited impact. Douyin popularity is high (overall ranking 17th), with significant exposure on short video platforms and high application attention. It has 26 A- or above disciplines, including A+ disciplines such as Chinese Language and Literature, Foreign Languages and Literatures, Astronomy, Physics, Chemistry, Geography, Geology, Atmospheric Science, Environmental Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, and Business Administration. Its academic strength is top-tier and highly matches the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Related majors in the liberal arts group (Chinese Language and Literature, Law, Economics, etc.) have stable to slightly hot social popularity. The total number of Gaokao candidates in Sichuan Province in 2026 is approximately 535,000, an increase of about 15.6% compared to 2025 (approximately 463,000). Estimating the history category proportion at about 38.5%, there are approximately 206,000 history category candidates, expanding the competition base. Nanjing University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, not a local university in Sichuan, with no local enrollment preference. Its enrollment plan in Sichuan has been increasing in recent years, reflecting attention to Sichuan students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 240, the mitigating effect of the significant 2026 expansion (+26.9%), and the intensifying competition effect of the increase in total Sichuan candidates (+15.6%), combined with high Douyin attention and the strong appeal of the university's top tier to candidates, a slight upward adjustment to 294 is made. The estimated minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 294, with a range of 258–330.
